name: Rusty Blade
description: A dull, chipped blade. Not much, but it cuts.

name: Bone Shield
description: A shield made from the bones of fallen dungeon crawlers.

name: Crimson Dagger
description: A wickedly sharp dagger that thirsts for blood.

name: Dungeon Plate
description: Heavy iron armor forged in the dungeon depths.

name: Viper Fang
description: A serrated blade dripping with venom. Strikes deep.

name: Obsidian Buckler
description: A jet-black shield that absorbs the force of impacts.

name: Ring of Fury
description: A ring that pulses with rage. Boosts attack but weakens defense.

name: Amulet of the Warden
description: An ancient amulet that grants the wearer unshakable resolve.

name: Doomhammer
description: A massive hammer of dark iron. Devastating, but heavy.

name: Dragonscale Vest
description: Armor woven from the scales of an ancient wyrm. Nearly impenetrable.

name: Phantom Cloak
description: A cloak that flickers between realms. Makes you harder to hit.

name: The Broadcaster's Eye
description: A legendary artifact from the final gate. Grants godlike stats.

name: Spectral Gauntlets
description: Ghostly gauntlets that phase through weak attacks. Light but effective.

name: Ironbark Bow
description: A bow carved from petrified dungeon wood. Strikes first, strikes hard.

name: Cultist's Robe
description: Dark robes that amplify magical energy but offer little protection.

name: Bloodstone Ring
description: A ring that feeds on your wounds. The lower your HP, the sharper you strike.

name: Warden's Greatsword
description: A massive blade once wielded by the dungeon's warden. Slow but crushing.

name: Cursed Mirror Shield
description: Reflects pain back to its source. Beautiful and terrifying.

name: Crown of Thorns
description: Pain grants power. Lose 1 HP per round but gain massive stats.

name: Abyssal Boots
description: Boots from the deepest floor. Grants unmatched agility and resilience.
